plates.prompt: alarm expression, eyes wide open, brows raised high, mouth small and open
delighted expression, eyes happy crescents, brows up, mouth in a small open smile
sleeping expression, eyes closed as two small curved graphite lines, mouth a tiny relaxed line
alert perked-up expression, ear-arm nubs projecting upward and forward, eyes focused, brows lifted

rules.description: Alarm reads through the eyes and brows ONLY: the two small graphite dot eyes open wide (still small dots, never glossy cartoon eyes), brows raised high above them, mouth a small open shape. No hair or tuft appears on the box-top. Full terracotta color on cream paper.

Delight reads as happy upward-arched (crescent) eyes with raised brows and a small open smile. The arched eyes are the expression's squint, not a change of eye style; no hair or tuft on the box-top; full terracotta color on cream paper, warm-graphite line and cross-hatch.

Sleep reads as closed eyes drawn as two small downward graphite arcs riding the construction midline, brows soft, mouth a tiny relaxed line. The closed-eye arcs are the sleep state of the two dot eyes, not a new eye style. No hair or tuft on the box-top; full terracotta color on cream paper.

Alert-perk reads as the two ear-arm nubs projecting upward and forward (perked) with focused small dot eyes and lifted brows. The nubs perk; the eyes stay small graphite dots, never enlarged glossy cartoon eyes; no hair or tuft on the box-top; full terracotta color on cream paper.
